scripture.verse: who forgives all your sins and heals all your diseases
scripture.reason: When we pray for healing, God reveals himself as the one who heals body and soul.
scripture.posture: Pray with trust and gratitude rather than fear.
scripture.key_word_hint: heals — God restores both the body and the heart.

bible_story.title: Healing at Bethesda
bible_story.summary: Jesus asked a man who had been lying for 38 years, 'Do you want to be made well?' and with a single word raised him to his feet.

testimony: God hears this prayer for health. A more detailed reflection will arrive once the AI analysis is ready.
